name: delivery-os
description: Claude Code plugin wrapper for Delivery OS workflow commands.

interface.shortDescription: Claude Code entrypoint for Delivery OS workflows.
interface.longDescription: Thin Claude Code plugin that routes init, feature, issue, and health-check actions to the Delivery OS CLI.
defaultPrompt: Initialize this repo with Delivery OS.
Create a Delivery OS workspace for this feature.
Run a Delivery OS health check.
